input.title: [x64] Reductions are too eager to promote to 64-bit
input.body:
```python
In [1]: import jax.numpy as jnp

In [2]: jnp.arange(4, dtype='int8').sum()
Out[2]: DeviceArray(6, dtype=int64)
```

The root cause is this line: https://github.com/google/jax/blob/d849f495193c69e8c133d0c6a424ba80d72938cb/jax/_src/numpy/reductions.py#L81

It's not an issue for floating-point types, because numpy does not promote those in most cases
